chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.32 of 2020 M/s Khursheed Engineering (Pvt.) Ltd. & others Versus M/s Agha Steel Industries Ltd. Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal. Dated: 23.10.2023 None present. -.-.- The office objections are pending ever since this appeal was filed and the matter is coming up for non-prosecution since last three dates. No one was present on behalf of the appellant on the last date and so also today. There is no intimation either. It seems that the appellants and their counsel have lost interest in the proceedings. Appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
